General.Name: Tianjin TEDA Biomedical Engineering Co Ltd
General.Description: Tianjin TEDA Biomedical Engineering Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of biological compound fertilizer products in the People's Republic of China. It operates through two segments: Fertiliser Products, and Elderly Care and Health Care Services. The company's biological compound fertilizer products include active fertilizer, mixture with nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium with various formulas that are used for the facilitation of balanced growth of grains, fruits, and vegetables. It also involved in the provision of integrated elderly and health care; elderly equipment leasing services; warehousing services; processing and licensing of the fertiliser products; research and development of elderly care business; and elderly care consulting, advisory, management, and assessment services. In addition, the company provides and licenses electroencephalography photography (EEG) diagnosis detection services; conducts EEG detection and diagnosis technology services. Further, the company engages in the research, development, manufacture, and application of biomedical science and technology projects; regional soil resources conditioning and remediation research services; specializing in system platform development; and provision of soil environmental quality standards research services, as well as information transmission, software, and information technology service industry. Tianjin TEDA Biomedical Engineering Company Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Tianjin, the People's Republic of China.

1.Name: Mr. Ka Kuen  Ng C.P.A., FCIS
